starting_state: Google News-discovered lead later resolved to a direct Yle article
direct_source_signal: Canonical Yle article text was directly captured and now supports institution-specific descriptive claims about AI-assisted administrative appeals, fabricated-case-reference signals, and response burden.
verification_result: Direct-source verification succeeded: the Finland row is no longer title-only and is now a bounded direct-source-resolved procedural-contamination comparator below official confirmation.
evidence_delta: Upgrades the row from platform-gated discovery friction to direct-source-resolved broadcaster support, while preserving that the next threshold still requires one official Finnish companion document.
paper_use: Supports methods/results prose on how a rare-language legal-process lead moved from discovery friction into reviewer-safe multilingual evidence without becoming document-grade authority.
dashboard_hook: Authority-escalation ladder and jurisdiction/language procedural-contamination panel
caution: Use the row for bounded descriptive and workload-burden claims only; do not convert it into official statistics, sanctions, or system-wide legal-process conclusions.

direct_source_signal: Crossref metadata resolves the underlying SAGE article DOI named in the report and exposes an `updated-by` corrigendum relation to DOI `10.1177/25148486241258320`, but direct publisher notice text is still not visible from this lane.
verification_result: Underlying article identity verified (`Breeding distrust: The biopolitics of chronic wasting disease in white-tailed deer`, Environment and Planning E: Nature and Space); correction-status metadata is now visible, but the direct corrective-action notice still is not captured.
evidence_delta: Upgrades the lead from generic outlet report to an article-linked correction-metadata row while preserving that the authoritative editorial action text is still missing.
paper_use: Feeds a reviewer-safe table on `article identified plus correction metadata` versus `editorial action text captured`.
caution: Do not treat article-level DOI resolution plus correction linkage as proof that the direct journal notice text or full correction wording has been captured.

direct_source_signal: Crossref metadata resolves both the original NEJM item and a separate retraction DOI; direct NEJM pages were blocked from this lane with HTTP 403.
verification_result: Direct metadata verification succeeded: original title is `RETRACTED: Bronchial Casts from Inhalation of Forest-Fire Smoke`; separate retraction title is `Retraction: Bronchial Casts from Inhalation of Forest-Fire Smoke. N Engl J Med 2026;394:1634.`
evidence_delta: Provides a stronger publisher-linked signal for synthetic-evidence contamination without claiming details from the blocked notice text.
paper_use: Supports a process-integrity figure connecting specialist discovery reporting to publisher DOI-level correction records.
caution: Use the DOI metadata narrowly; do not restate editorial reasoning beyond what is visible in the title-level metadata unless the notice text is captured.

direct_source_signal: Publisher page and Crossref metadata both expose the linked Springer item as a retracted article.
verification_result: Direct publisher-originating signal captured: Springer page title and Crossref title both read `RETRACTED ARTICLE: Artificial intelligence to enhance hemodynamic management in the ICU`.
evidence_delta: Adds the first directly retrievable publisher-page retraction signal inside shard 008, strengthening the contamination queue beyond specialist reporting alone.
paper_use: Useful for a manuscript sentence that some shard-008 rows can already be tied to publisher-maintained correction surfaces.
caution: The accessible page shows retracted status, but the exact editor-note reasoning about the fake self-citation still requires the linked note or archived notice before stronger interpretation.

lead_title_short: Springer ML book / retracted status page
starting_state: Publisher-visible retracted book status without captured rationale
direct_source_signal: Public Springer chapter page and chapter PDF expose a direct publisher notice stating that the Series Editor and the Publisher retracted the book after reference-validity concerns and that 25 of 46 references could not be verified.
verification_result: Direct publisher-originating notice text captured from a public Springer chapter PDF, while the book landing page remains a weaker status-only surface.
evidence_delta: Upgrades the row from publisher-visible retracted status to direct publisher notice text, broadening shard 008 beyond journal articles into book-length reference infrastructure contamination.
paper_use: Supports a reviewer-safe venue-type comparison showing that direct notice text now exists for both a journal article and a book row.
dashboard_hook: Notice-text funnel; venue-type comparison panel; metadata-consistency facet
caution: Use only the direct publisher-bounded rationale about unverifiable references; do not infer intent or broader Springer practice from this one notice.

starting_state: DOI-identified article without captured editorial action
direct_source_signal: Retraction Watch quotes journal editor Krithika Srinivasan stating that the journal investigated the paper, that Sage would take actions in line with policy, and that the incorrect references were generated when an author used ChatGPT to insert citations and the reference list after the original manuscript had correct references.
direct_source_url_or_id: Retraction Watch article dated 2024-05-20 quoting Environment and Planning E editor; article DOI `10.1177/25148486241235821`
source_family: attributed institutional statement via specialist reporting + doi_registry_metadata
verification_result: Mediated institutional statement captured, but not yet a direct journal or publisher notice.
evidence_delta: Creates a reviewer-safe intermediate class between `specialist report only` and `direct notice text`, which matters for hostile-reviewer description of source depth.
paper_use: Document-depth ladder and source-authority facet for research-integrity rows
dashboard_hook: Treat the quoted editor statement as mediated public evidence, not as a direct publisher notice or final editorial action until the journal/publisher record is directly captured.

starting_state: Crossref/PubMed metadata plus blocked publisher page
direct_source_signal: Wayback captures of the NEJM retraction notice and original page now expose direct publisher-originating text and a visible RETRACTED original-page banner even though the live NEJM page remains blocked from this lane.
verification_result: Archive-resolved direct publisher notice verification succeeded: the archived retraction notice states that the authors used an AI tool to move the ruler to the top of the image and requested retraction, and the archived original page visibly carries the retracted status.
evidence_delta: Promotes the row from blocked metadata-only corroboration into a direct notice-text exemplar while preserving that the evidence is carried by archived public publisher pages rather than a live NEJM page.
paper_use: Supports one non-Springer direct-notice exemplar for Table 1E, manuscript methods/results prose, and a thesis synthetic-evidence contamination note.
dashboard_hook: Blocked-versus-archived notice-depth facet and publisher-diversity threshold panel
caution: Use the archived NEJM text narrowly and do not generalize into broader misconduct, clinical significance, or prevalence claims.
